title: Never Say Never
overview: A former boxing champion takes decides to break a few rules and train orphans from China's remote countryside in order to give them a future.

trailers.title: NEVER SAY NEVER (BA JIAO LONG ZHONG) 八角笼中 opens July 28th in select US & Canadian theaters!
